SELECT 'classrooms' as tbl, count\(*\) as cnt FROM classrooms UNION ALL

SELECT 'chat_rooms', count\(*\) FROM chat_rooms UNION ALL
SELECT 'chat_messages', count\(*\) FROM chat_messages UNION ALL
SELECT 'student_chat_rooms', count\(*\) FROM student_chat_rooms UNION ALL
SELECT 'student_chat_messages', count\(*\) FROM student_chat_messages UNION ALL
SELECT 'individual_support_plans', count\(*\) FROM individual_support_plans UNION ALL
SELECT 'support_plan_details', count\(*\) FROM support_plan_details UNION ALL
SELECT 'monitoring_records', count\(*\) FROM monitoring_records UNION ALL
SELECT 'monitoring_details', count\(*\) FROM monitoring_details UNION ALL
SELECT 'kakehashi_periods', count\(*\) FROM kakehashi_periods UNION ALL
SELECT 'kakehashi_staff', count\(*\) FROM kakehashi_staff UNION ALL
SELECT 'kakehashi_guardian', count\(*\) FROM kakehashi_guardian UNION ALL
SELECT 'daily_records', count\(*\) FROM daily_records UNION ALL
SELECT 'student_records', count\(*\) FROM student_records UNION ALL
SELECT 'integrated_notes', count\(*\) FROM integrated_notes UNION ALL
SELECT 'newsletters', count\(*\) FROM newsletters UNION ALL
SELECT 'events', count\(*\) FROM events UNION ALL
SELECT 'event_registrations', count\(*\) FROM event_registrations UNION ALL
SELECT 'holidays', count\(*\) FROM holidays UNION ALL
SELECT 'absence_notifications', count\(*\) FROM absence_notifications UNION ALL
SELECT 'submission_requests', count\(*\) FROM submission_requests UNION ALL
SELECT 'student_submissions', count\(*\) FROM student_submissions UNION ALL
SELECT 'weekly_plans', count\(*\) FROM weekly_plans UNION ALL

ORDER BY tbl;
" 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec kiduri2026-postgres-1 psql -U kiduri -d kiduri -c "
-- Verify sequences
SELECT 'users' as tbl, MAX\(id\) as max_id, currval\(pg_get_serial_sequence\('users', 'id'\)\) as seq_val FROM users UNION ALL
SELECT 'students', MAX\(id\), currval\(pg_get_serial_sequence\('students', 'id'\)\) FROM students UNION ALL
SELECT 'classrooms', MAX\(id\), currval\(pg_get_serial_sequence\('classrooms', 'id'\)\) FROM classrooms;
" 2>&1)
